content.en:
"The authority of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance has reached the veteran level!"

Ye Tian was in the Supreme Dao Void and entered the Hall of the Elders.

Here, he enjoys the privilege of a veteran, and can inquire about any information and information of the Supreme Void.

"Six hundred and thirteen elders!"

This is the current number of elders in the Elder Palace, and it is also all the elders of the entire Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

"There are so many patriarchs!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

However, most of the patriarchs were in a deep sleep, almost all of them were the patriarchs of the era of the first patriarch, and they couldn't make progress in cultivation, and they were idle and bored, so they fell asleep one by one, and they would wake up unless they encountered something big.

Therefore, Ye Tiancai had never seen these elders.

There are also some elders who are in special places and can't come out, so they can't be summoned last time.

After all, it would take time to rush over, and it would be impossible for the First Elder to wait for them to come back, in that case, there would be no time to go to the Ancient Abyss Realm.

And after entering the Senate Hall, he also knew the division of the Senators.

The first-grade elders are the thirty-six elders of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, and they are also the elders with specific rankings.

The second-level patriarch is the kind of patriarch who has cultivated to reach the middle or late stage of the legendary Dao realm, and the mythical body has reached multiple transformations.

The third level is an ordinary veteran, and the gap in strength is relatively large.

Like Soho and Su Yuan, they all belong to the third-level elders, and most of the veterans are in the third grade.

"My strength should be at the second level!"

Ye Tian estimated.

However, he has only broken through to the Mythical Dao Realm, and there is still a lot of room for improvement.

For example, let those eighteen supreme legendary bodies transform into supreme mythical bodies one after another, if he does this, his strength will usher in a huge transformation and improvement.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took out the Legendary Ancient Tooth Stone, and he found a lot of this resource in the Legendary Bitter Sea, which helped the Legendary Body to transform into a Mythical Body.

"Let the Dragon Scale Legend Body transform into a Dragon Scale Myth Body first!"

Ye Tian directly swallowed a lot of legendary ancient tooth stones, and then cultivated with the help of legendary blood treasures.

Rumble!!!!

With enough Legendary Ancient Tooth Stones, coupled with the Legendary Blood Treasure that can assist in cultivating the Mythical Body, it is naturally not difficult for him to transform the Dragon Scale Legendary Body into the Dragon Scale Mythical Body.

After a while.

Ye Tian's dragon scale legend body began to transform and evolved into a dragon scale myth body.

"Metamorphosis!"

Ye Tian felt that his body had become stronger, and his strength had skyrocketed.

However, his dragon scale myth body is only one metamorphosis, and there are two metamorphoses, three metamorphoses, four metamorphoses, etc., each metamorphosis will be more difficult, and the resources consumed are unimaginable.

But Ye Tian has the legendary blood treasure, and he has the hope of transforming again and again.

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian transformed the other seventeen legendary bodies into mythological bodies one by one.

When hundreds of thousands of Supreme Dao Epochs passed, Ye Tian's eighteen supreme legendary bodies all became supreme mythical bodies, and the strength of the whole person skyrocketed a lot.

However, if you want to complete the secondary transformation of these mythical bodies, it will take time and resources.

Moreover, he doesn't have so many special resources, so he can only use normal resources and legendary blood treasures to cultivate, so he can only improve slowly.

......

Agar Pulp Realm.

This is a special treasure place in the Void Realm, where the elders can condense the Agar to Dao Gold Liquid and the Agar Golden Feather Liquid.

After Ye Tian became a patriarch, he also knew about this place.

this day.

Ye Tian came here, and he was going to refine some Agar Pulp Dao Gold Liquid and Agar Pulp Golden Feather Night in the Agar Pulp Realm.

The Agar Realm is full of magma, and this is not ordinary magma, but magma with terrifying power.

The Patriarchs needed to use the Second Sequence of Supreme Dao Rules to extract drops of agar from these magma to Dao Gold Liquid.

And the patriarch who had just comprehended the rules of the second sequence of the Supreme Dao, ten thousand Solstice Era could condense a drop of elixir to Dao golden liquid.

But Ye Tian was different, he comprehended the rules of the first sequence of the Dao, and the efficiency of condensing the elixir to the Dao gold liquid would naturally be higher.

"Try how long it takes to condense the elixir to the Dao gold liquid. "

Ye Tian stood in a place of magma and began to use the first sequence of Supreme Dao rules to extract the agar to Dao gold liquid.

One solstice epoch after another time passed, three hundred solstice epochs later.

A drop of elixir to the golden liquid condensed.

"Only three hundred solstices can condense a drop of agar to Dao gold liquid, the speed is very fast, in this way, ten thousand solstice can condense more than thirty drops of agar to Dao gold liquid, if you let five replica bodies condense agar to Dao gold liquid here, you can condense more than 100 drops of agar syrup to Dao gold liquid in the time of ten thousand to Dao era!"

Ye Tian was going to spend a hundred years of the Dao Era condensing the Agar Essence to the Dao Gold Liquid here, so that he could condense more than 10,000 drops of the Agar Essence to the Dao Gold Liquid.

A single drop of Agar Jelly Dao Gold Liquid can make an ordinary Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm cultivator quickly rise to the peak of the Ninefold Dao Realm, and one can imagine how many Ninefold Peak Dao Realms can be cultivated by 10,000 drops of Agar Essence Dao Golden Liquid.

Of course.

He was also going to let a replica body condense the Agar Golden Feather Liquid here for a long time, which required going deep into the core of the Agar Realm and slowly condensing a drop of the Agar Golden Feather Liquid there.

In this period when his strength could not be improved quickly, he wanted to let the human race give birth to more legends to the Dao realm, as well as patriarchs.

this day.

Ye Tian finally used the Miluo statue to study the Miluo domain.

"The Miro Domain has been studied!"

Ye Tian was very excited.

......

Terran Temple.

Ye Tian opened up a void here, and then a replica body was ready to sit in this void for a long time.

I saw a statue of Miro appear on his body, and a wave of power spread out from the statue of Miro.

"Miro's Domain, Condensation!"

In an instant, the Mira Domain was formed, completely merging with this void.

As long as the statue of Miro does not leave here, the domain of Miro will not collapse.

"I have to let my wife, son, and daughter enter here to comprehend the rules of the Dao!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

They are only allowed to enter here, and others, even grandchildren, are not allowed to enter, otherwise the news will spread, and the impact will be too great, and he can't hold it back now.

Soon.

Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, and Ye Xingyue entered this void.

"Father!"

Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue shouted.

"You guys are here to comprehend the rules of the Supreme Dao and try the effect!"

Ye Tian said.

Ye Xingchen was a little puzzled, there is no Supreme Dao rule item, what is the Supreme Dao rule here? ?

Still, they did what their father commanded.

Ye Xingchen sat cross-legged and began to comprehend the rules of the third sequence of the Dao.

As soon as he came to his senses, he was shocked.
